name: NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 — Security and Privacy Controls
description: Security and privacy controls for information systems and organizations published by NIST. Applicable to all U.S. federal information systems and widely adopted in private sector as best-practice baseline.

controls.title: Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Develop, document, and disseminate access control policy and procedures.

controls.title: Account Management
controls.description: Manage information system accounts, including establishing, activating, modifying, reviewing, disabling, and removing accounts.

controls.title: Access Enforcement
controls.description: Enforce approved authorizations for logical access to information and system resources.

controls.title: Information Flow Enforcement
controls.description: Enforce approved authorizations for controlling the flow of information within the system and between systems.

controls.title: Separation of Duties
controls.description: Separate duties of individuals to reduce the risk of malevolent activity without collusion.

controls.title: Least Privilege
controls.description: Employ the principle of least privilege, allowing only authorized accesses for users that are necessary to accomplish assigned tasks.

controls.title: Unsuccessful Logon Attempts
controls.description: Enforce a limit of consecutive invalid access attempts by a user during a specified time period.

controls.title: Device Lock
controls.description: Prevent further access to the system by initiating a session lock after a period of inactivity.

controls.title: Remote Access
controls.description: Establish and document usage restrictions, configuration and connection requirements for each type of remote access.

controls.title: Publicly Accessible Content
controls.description: Designate individuals authorized to post information onto a publicly accessible system.

controls.title: Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Develop, document, and disseminate security awareness and training policy and procedures.

controls.title: Literacy Training and Awareness
controls.description: Provide basic security and privacy literacy training to system users as part of initial training for new users.

controls.title: Role-Based Training
controls.description: Provide role-based security and privacy training to personnel with assigned security and privacy roles and responsibilities.

controls.title: Training Records
controls.description: Document and monitor information security and privacy training activities.

controls.title: Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Develop, document, and disseminate audit and accountability policy and procedures.

controls.title: Event Logging
controls.description: Identify the types of events that the system is capable of logging in support of the audit function.

controls.title: Content of Audit Records
controls.description: Ensure that audit records contain sufficient information to establish what events occurred.

controls.title: Audit Record Review, Analysis, and Reporting
controls.description: Review and analyze system audit records for indications of inappropriate or unusual activity.

controls.title: Protection of Audit Information
controls.description: Protect audit information and audit tools from unauthorized access, modification, and deletion.

controls.title: Audit Record Retention
controls.description: Retain audit records for a defined period to provide support for after-the-fact investigations.

controls.title: Audit Record Generation
controls.description: Provide audit record generation capability for the event types defined in AU-2.

controls.title: Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Develop, document, and disseminate assessment, authorization, and monitoring policy.

controls.title: Control Assessments
controls.description: Select the appropriate assessor or assessment team and assess the controls in the system and its environment of operation.

controls.title: Information Exchange
controls.description: Approve and manage the exchange of information between the system and other systems using interconnection security agreements.

controls.title: Plan of Action and Milestones
controls.description: Develop a plan of action and milestones for the system to document the planned remediation actions.

controls.title: Authorization
controls.description: Assign a senior official as the authorizing official for the system.

controls.title: Continuous Monitoring
controls.description: Develop a system-level continuous monitoring strategy and implement continuous monitoring.

controls.title: Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Develop, document, and disseminate configuration management policy and procedures.

controls.title: Baseline Configuration
controls.description: Develop, document, and maintain a current baseline configuration of the information system.

controls.title: Impact Analyses
controls.description: Analyze changes to the system to determine potential security and privacy impacts prior to change implementation.

controls.title: Configuration Settings
controls.description: Establish and document configuration settings for information technology products employed within the information system.

controls.title: Least Functionality
controls.description: Configure the system to provide only essential capabilities, prohibiting or restricting the use of functions, ports, protocols, and services not required.

controls.title: System Component Inventory
controls.description: Develop and document an inventory of system components that accurately reflects the current system.

controls.title: Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Develop, document, and disseminate contingency planning policy and procedures.

controls.title: Contingency Plan
controls.description: Develop a contingency plan for the system that identifies essential missions and business functions.

controls.title: Contingency Plan Testing
controls.description: Test the contingency plan for the system to determine the effectiveness of the plan.

controls.title: System Backup
controls.description: Conduct backups of user-level information, system-level information, and system documentation.

controls.title: System Recovery and Reconstitution
controls.description: Provide for the recovery and reconstitution of the system to a known state after a disruption.

controls.title: Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Develop, document, and disseminate identification and authentication policy and procedures.

controls.title: Identification and Authentication (Organizational Users)
controls.description: Uniquely identify and authenticate organizational users and associate that unique identification with processes acting on behalf of those users.

controls.title: Device Identification and Authentication
controls.description: Uniquely identify and authenticate devices before establishing connections.

controls.title: Authenticator Management
controls.description: Manage information system authenticators by verifying the identity of the individual, group, role, or device receiving the authenticator.

controls.title: Identification and Authentication (Non-Organizational Users)
controls.description: Uniquely identify and authenticate non-organizational users or processes acting on behalf of non-organizational users.

controls.title: Identity Proofing
controls.description: Identity-proof users who require accounts for logical access to systems based on appropriate identity assurance level requirements.

controls.title: Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Develop, document, and disseminate incident response policy and procedures.

controls.title: Incident Response Training
controls.description: Provide incident response training to system users consistent with assigned roles and responsibilities.

controls.title: Incident Handling
controls.description: Implement an incident handling capability for security incidents that includes preparation, detection and analysis, containment, eradication, and recovery.

controls.title: Incident Monitoring
controls.description: Track and document system security incidents.

controls.title: Incident Reporting
controls.description: Require personnel to report suspected incidents to the organizational incident response capability.

controls.title: Incident Response Plan
controls.description: Develop an incident response plan that provides the organization with a roadmap for implementing its incident response capability.

controls.title: Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Develop, document, and disseminate risk assessment policy and procedures.

controls.title: Security Categorization
controls.description: Categorize the system and information it processes, stores, and transmits.

controls.title: Risk Assessment
controls.description: Conduct a risk assessment, including the likelihood and magnitude of harm from unauthorized access, use, disclosure, disruption, modification, or destruction.

controls.title: Vulnerability Monitoring and Scanning
controls.description: Monitor and scan for vulnerabilities in the system and hosted applications periodically and when new vulnerabilities are identified.

controls.title: Risk Response
controls.description: Respond to findings from security and privacy assessments, monitoring, and audits.

controls.title: Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Develop, document, and disseminate system and communications protection policy and procedures.

controls.title: Denial of Service Protection
controls.description: Implement protections against or limit the effects of denial-of-service attacks.

controls.title: Boundary Protection
controls.description: Monitor and control communications at the external boundary of the system and at key internal boundaries within the system.

controls.title: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity
controls.description: Implement cryptographic mechanisms to prevent unauthorized disclosure of information during transmission.

controls.title: Cryptographic Key Establishment and Management
controls.description: Establish and manage cryptographic keys when cryptography is employed within the system.

controls.title: Protection of Information at Rest
controls.description: Implement cryptographic mechanisms to prevent unauthorized disclosure and modification of information at rest.

controls.title: Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Develop, document, and disseminate system and information integrity policy and procedures.

controls.title: Flaw Remediation
controls.description: Identify, report, and correct information system flaws; test software and firmware updates related to flaw remediation.

controls.title: Malicious Code Protection
controls.description: Implement malicious code protection mechanisms at system entry and exit points.

controls.title: System Monitoring
controls.description: Monitor the system to detect attacks and indicators of potential attacks, and unauthorized local, network, and remote connections.

controls.title: Software, Firmware, and Information Integrity
controls.description: Employ integrity verification tools to detect unauthorized changes to software, firmware, and information.

controls.title: Information Input Validation
controls.description: Check the validity of the following information inputs: defined information inputs to the system.

controls.title: Information Management and Retention
controls.description: Manage and retain information within the system and information output from the system in accordance with applicable laws, regulations, and organizational policies.

controls.title: Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Develop, document, and disseminate supply chain risk management policy and procedures.

controls.title: Supply Chain Risk Management Plan
controls.description: Develop a plan for managing supply chain risks associated with the research and development, design, manufacturing, acquisition, delivery, integration, operations, maintenance, and disposal of systems, components, or services.

controls.title: Supply Chain Controls and Processes
controls.description: Establish a process or processes to identify and address weaknesses or deficiencies in the supply chain elements and processes of the system.

controls.title: Acquisition Strategies, Tools, and Methods
controls.description: Employ acquisition strategies, contract tools, and procurement methods to protect against, identify, and mitigate supply chain risks.

controls.title: Notification Agreements
controls.description: Establish agreements and procedures with entities involved in the supply chain for the system, component, or service for notifying the relevant parties of cybersecurity incidents and breaches.
